features: A nourishing shampoo enriched with Banana.
Leaves hair feeling sleek, shiny, and smooth.
Mild and soft on hair, leaves it smelling deliciously fruity!
SLES Free, Paraben Free, Dermatologically tested.
description: Product Description XHC Banana Shampoo has been specially formulated to be paraben and sulfate free to provide less irritation so that it's milder and softer on hair. Developed in the UK. Ingredients AQUA, SODIUM C14-16 OLEFIN SULFONATE, COCAMIDOPROPYL BETAINE, COCAMIDE MEA, POLYQUATERNIUM-7, SODIUM CHLORIDE, PEG-7 GLYCERYL COCOATE, DMDM HYDANTOIN, PARFUM, STYRENE/ACRYLATES COPOLYMER, MUSA SAPIENTUM (BANANA) FRUIT EXTRACT, GUAR HYDROXYPROPYLTRIMONIUM CHLORIDE, CITRIC ACID, DISODIUM EDTA, CI 19140, CI 16035. Directions Apply to wet hair, massage into a lather, rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning Banana Shampoo See more

specifications_table.Benefits: Anti-Dandruff, Anti-Hair Loss, Breakage Control, Damage Control, Softening,Smoothening,Nourishing
